sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52205" key="kakoqe/reios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-θέρειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a bad summer</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Proll.Hes.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
